metadata.scope: NBA/NHL/MLB models + POTD engine + execution gates

vars.name: EXECUTION_FRESHNESS_CONTRACT
vars.notes: JSON override for freshness contract. Cadence-based staleness detection (0-60m fresh, 60-120m valid w/ flag, >120m expired). Prevents qualification if snapshot EXPIRED.

vars.name: ENABLE_WITHOUT_ODDS_MODE
vars.notes: Projection-only mode: if true, emit LEAN for any projection signal regardless of edge-based status. Qualification: relaxes edge requirement for plays. Exec: allows projections without live odds.

vars.name: ENABLE_WELCOME_HOME
vars.notes: Enables rest-advantage driver logic for welcome-home scenarios. If false, driver is skipped, no welcome-home plays qualify.

vars.name: NHL_1P_FAIR_PROB_PHASE2
vars.notes: Phase-2 gate for NHL 1P fair probability math. Requires stable real 1P line. If true, enables advanced fair-prob calc. If false or real 1P unavailable, downgrades 1P PLAY → LEAN per WI-0839.

vars.name: NHL_1P_SIGMA
vars.notes: NHL 1P moneyline model variance scalar. Used in fair-prob calculation. If uncalibrated (<history threshold), all 1P PLAY → LEAN per WI-0814 downgrade logic.

vars.name: USE_ORCHESTRATED_MARKET
vars.notes: If true, uses orchestrated market input instead of raw odds. Changes market-source integrity checks and line availability.

vars.name: ENABLE_NBA_MODEL
vars.notes: If false, NBA model runner skipped entirely. No NBA cards produced; qualification gate prevents all NBA plays.

vars.name: ENABLE_NHL_MODEL
vars.notes: If false, NHL model runner skipped entirely. No NHL cards produced; qualification gate prevents all NHL plays.

vars.name: ENABLE_MLB_MODEL
vars.notes: If false, MLB model runner skipped entirely. No MLB cards produced; qualification gate prevents all MLB plays.

vars.name: ENABLE_POTD
vars.notes: If false, POTD runner skipped. No POTD play produced. Qualification gate prevents all POTD candidates.

vars.name: POTD_MIN_EDGE
vars.notes: Minimum model edge to qualify POTD candidate. Below this, play rejected entirely. 0.005 edge play rejected 99.5% of time.

vars.name: POTD_MIN_TOTAL_SCORE
vars.notes: Minimum composite score (lineValue×0.625 + marketConsensus×0.375) [0,1] to qualify. Below 0.30 → no candidate viability.

vars.name: POTD_STARTING_BANKROLL
vars.notes: Initial bankroll for Kelly fraction sizing. Affects wager % calculation. Too low (≤$0) breaks Kelly math. Used: stake = bankroll × kellyFraction × edge.

vars.name: POTD_KELLY_FRACTION
vars.notes: Fractional Kelly multiplier for POTD sizing. Lower = conservative stake. Higher = aggressive. 0.25 = quarter-Kelly (standard).

vars.name: POTD_MAX_WAGER_PCT
vars.notes: Hard cap on stake as % of bankroll. Prevents Kelly from sizing bets >N%. 0.02 = max $0.20 on $10 bankroll.

vars.name: POTD_MIN_STAKE_PCT
vars.notes: Minimum stake as % of bankroll. If Kelly gives <0.5%, reject play (edge too thin). $0.05 minimum on $10 bankroll.

vars.name: MIN_MLB_GAMES_FOR_RECAL
vars.notes: Threshold for empirical sigma recalibration (WI-0648). Once team reaches N settled games, empirical sigma replaces defaults. Low threshold → early downgrade from uncalibrated. High → delayed calibration.

vars.name: ESPN_NULL_ALERT_THRESHOLD
vars.notes: Number of ESPN null metric teams needed to trigger alert (monitored; not qualification gating). Affects noise level in Discord alerts.

vars.name: POTD_MAX_NOMINEES
vars.notes: Max nominees stored per day. Affects display only; does not gate qualification. Out of scope for qualification audit but included for completeness.

vars.name: ENABLE_DISCORD_CARD_WEBHOOKS
vars.notes: Toggles Discord alert webhook. If false, Discord alerts disabled (UI layer). Does not affect card qualification or gating. Out of scope (UI toggle).

vars.name: DISCORD_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL
vars.notes: Discord webhook URL for alerts. If missing, alerts skipped gracefully (logged). Does not affect card generation. Out of scope (UI).

vars.name: DISCORD_POTD_WEBHOOK_URL
vars.notes: Discord webhook URL for POTD alerts. If missing, POTD Discord posts skipped. Does not affect play qualification. Out of scope (UI).

vars.name: ENABLE_NFL_MODEL
vars.notes: Season gate: disabled Sept–Dec, re-enabled ~Sept 1. If false, NFL runner skipped, no NFL plays.

vars.name: ENABLE_FPL_MODEL
vars.notes: FPL model enable gate. If false, FPL runner skipped, no FPL cards produced.

vars.name: ENABLE_NCAAM_MODEL
vars.dead_reason: Var exists in code but model runner (run_ncaam_model.js) disabled per WI-0894 cleanup (Q1 2026). Conditional check remains but never true in production.
vars.notes: Historical gate for NCAA Men's Basketball (disabled Q1 2026 per WI-0894 cleanup). Var still exists in code but model runner never executes. Consider removal after dead code cleanup.

vars.name: MLB_K_PROP_FRESHNESS_MINUTES
vars.notes: Freshness window for MLB pitcher K prop odds. Props older than N minutes treated as stale. Does not gate qualification (props are optional). Out of scope (prop handling).

vars.name: PITCHER_KS_MODEL_MODE
vars.notes: MLB pitcher K runtime mode selector. If not set, determined dynamically per pitcher. Out of scope (projection mode selection).

vars.name: MLB_K_PROPS
vars.notes: MLB K props operational mode. 'SHADOW'=projection-only, 'LIVE'=odds-backed, 'OFF'=disabled. Out of scope (K props mode).

vars.name: MODEL_ODDS_MAX_AGE_MINUTES
vars.notes: Max age for odds snapshot before considered stale. Fallback if sport-specific contract not set. Out of scope (odds provider timing, internal to execution-gate).

vars.name: ODDS_GAP_ALERT_MINUTES
vars.notes: Alert threshold if odds haven't refreshed in N minutes. Out of scope (monitoring, not qualification).

vars.name: ENABLE_CLV_LEDGER
vars.notes: Toggles CLV ledger recording. Does not gate qualification or play execution. Out of scope (metrics recording).
